executiveSummary.text: XPeng is a Chinese EV maker with credible software and autonomous driving capability, but it remains trapped in a brutal domestic EV price war. At $17.80, with a ~$16.5bn market cap, the stock sits closer to the bottom of its 52-week range than the top. The core debate is simple: can XPeng translate strong product and software into durable gross margin expansion before the market loses patience?Bottom line: HOLD — SPECULATIVE. Interesting technology, weak industry structure, no profits. Worth wa

businessModel.text: XPeng designs and sells premium EVs in China and is increasingly positioning itself as a software-defined vehicle business. Revenue comes from vehicle sales plus smaller contributions from services and software features. The long-term bull case is not just EV volume, it is software monetisation and autonomous driving differentiation.

recentCatalysts.text: China EV competition remains intense, compressing industry margins.Any evidence of improving delivery growth and gross margin would matter.Autonomous driving and software partnerships remain the strategic upside lever.
items: China EV competition remains intense, compressing industry margins.

Autonomous driving and software partnerships remain the strategic upside lever.

thesisEvaluation.text: Base case is that XPeng survives and grows, but profitability remains delayed. Bull case requires strong software monetisation and margin recovery. Bear case is continued price competition and capital destruction.

bull.scenario: Bull case requires strong software monetisation and margin recovery.

base.scenario: Base case is that XPeng survives and grows, but profitability remains delayed. Bull case requires strong software monetisation and margin recovery.

bear.scenario: Bear case is continued price competition and capital destruction.

risks.risk: 1China EV price war continues longer than expected.

recommendation.text:
HOLD — SPECULATIVE. Better than many peers operationally, but still not a high-quality industry.Entry / Exit: Below $16 gets more interesting. Above $24 starts to look stretched without a margin turn.

entryExit.text:
Xpeng (XPEV) — Entry / Exit Framework

HOLD zone: $16.03–$17.77 — current levels are fairly valued.
Trim / Take Profits above $17.77 — approaching the 52-week high at $28.23.
Stop-loss: A sustained close below $15.07 (52-week low) would warrant reassessment.
